{{Quote|Well, there are some canyons on Luuq Two that are every bit as deep. Then there's Kismaano for cliffside dwellings. And, of course, Kashyyyk for trees...|Han Solo|<ref name="Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Luuq Two''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Luuq system/Legends|Luuq system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Luuq sector/Legends|Luuq sector]] that was known for its beautiful, deep canyons.<ref name="Force" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1stm}}
